member.name: T:Padlocks.Padlock`1
member.summary: Padlock is a lightweight, high-performance library that provides key-based locking for multithreaded applications. It enables granular locking on specific resources identified by keys of any type, allowing for efficient concurrency control without unnecessary blocking.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with configurable concurrency and pooling.
member.param: Maximum number of concurrent holders for each key. Default is 1 (exclusive lock).
Maximum number of pooled lock entries for reuse. Default is 20.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.Lock(`0)
member.summary: Acquires a lock for the specified key. Returns a disposable handle that will release the lock when disposed.
member.param: The key on which to lock.
member.returns: A disposable object that releases the lock when disposed.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockAsync(`0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Asynchronously acquires a lock for the specified key.
member.param: The key on which to lock.
member.returns: A disposable object that releases the lock when disposed.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.IsLocked(`0)
member.summary: Checks if a key is currently locked.

member.name: F:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockEntry.Semaphore
member.summary: The semaphore used to control concurrent access.

member.name: F:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockEntry.RefCount
member.summary: The number of active references to this entry.

member.name: F:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockEntry.IsRemoved
member.summary: Indicates whether this entry has been removed from the dictionary.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockEntry.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new lock entry with the specified max concurrency count.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockEntry.Reset(System.Int32)
member.summary: Resets this entry for reuse from the pool.

member.name: M:Padlocks.Padlock`1.LockReleaser.#ctor(Padlocks.Padlock{`0},Padlocks.Padlock{`0}.LockEntry,`0)
member.param: The key associated with this lock.
